w://3d824ee9979315a6b55f290255186857ce9a7f16a8a87f25ea1d4a99ce501f91","dweb:/ipfs/QmZXwtjkYak9Mz5zg9qpWR3L1Yft6dB6zJegL99Ck2BinG"]}},"version":1}

_createMarketExternal(uint256,bytes32).details: Callable only via `this` from performUpkeep so failures are catchable.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

activeMarkets(uint256).notice: Same layout as the default getter for a public array of structs.

addPair(bytes32).notice: Whitelist a pair and include it in automated cycling (idempotent for cycling list).

checkUpkeep(bytes).notice: Called off-chain by Chainlink Automation nodes every block.

cyclingPairAt(uint256).notice: Pair id at index in the cycling list (for indexers / backends).

cyclingPairCount().notice: Number of pairs that participate in automated market creation.

pairTfLastCreated(bytes32,uint256).notice: Last `block.timestamp` when a market was created for (pairId, timeframeIndex).

performUpkeep(bytes).notice: Called on-chain by Chainlink Automation when checkUpkeep returns true.

pruneResolved().notice: Remove resolved markets from the active array (swap-and-pop).

withdrawFunds(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw any ERC-20 from this contract.
